fields.summary: Improve webservice to list aggregated log files

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

fields.summary: Obtaining app logs for Running application fails with "Unable to parse json from webservice. Error:"

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: Add a new web service to list the files on a container in AHSWebService

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

fields.summary: improve YARN webservice to output aggregated container logs

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

comments.body:
The fix includes:
* add an ability to list aggregated log files in NM/AHS WebService
* re-factory the logfile list functions to remove the duplicate code
* add ContainerLogType: LOCAL or Aggregated to differentiate the aggregated logs and local logs.

This message was automatically generated.

Thanks [~xgong] for this code refactor effort. The code does look much cleaner!
Most changes looks fine to me. Except one: for new added class - PerContainerLogFileInfo, because we are put it in generic type container like: List, we should override hashCode() and equals(). Otherwise, it could behave strange in some corner cases.
Also, please check if findbug warning is related. If so, please fix it.
Other looks fine to me.

Thanks for the review. [~junping_du]

Uploaded new patches to address your comments

status.name: Resolved

comments.body:
The fix includes:
* add an ability to list aggregated log files in NM/AHS WebService
* re-factory the logfile list functions to remove the duplicate code
* add ContainerLogType: LOCAL or Aggregated to differentiate the aggregated logs and local logs.

Thanks [~xgong] for this code refactor effort. The code does look much cleaner!
Most changes looks fine to me. Except one: for new added class - PerContainerLogFileInfo, because we are put it in generic type container like: List, we should override hashCode() and equals(). Otherwise, it could behave strange in some corner cases.
Also, please check if findbug warning is related. If so, please fix it.
Other looks fine to me.

Thanks for the review. [~junping_du]
